title: hieracium verbascifolium subsp. thapsifolium
intro: Hieracium verbascifolium subsp. thapsifolium, also known as Hawkweed or Woolly Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Hieracium verbascifolium subsp. thapsifolium is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
